scripts.build: bun --filter @dgchallenge/shared build && bun --filter @dgchallenge/api build && bun --filter @dgchallenge/web build
scripts.lint: bun --filter @dgchallenge/shared lint && bun --filter @dgchallenge/api lint && bun --filter @dgchallenge/web lint
scripts.typecheck: bun --filter @dgchallenge/shared typecheck && bun --filter @dgchallenge/api typecheck && bun --filter @dgchallenge/web typecheck
